text: Standing in this modern, brightly lit space discussing technology and cleanliness, I feel strangely self-aware—caught between fascination and a slight unease about the omnipresence of machines and glass barriers. The vibrant display about research and development on the wall speaks to optimism and progress, yet, as I listen, I sense a certain distance between the ideals of innovation and the mundane details of maintenance. I am both an observer and a participant in the ever-advancing interplay of human and machine.
